metadata.description: White-label Facebook ad-comment mining for Claude Code. Connect your own Meta app + ad account + Cloudflare R2, rank top-spending / positive-ROI ad posts over any window, scrape every comment + reply (read-only), mirror media to R2, and publish a searchable gallery. Zero dependencies — pure Python standard library.

plugins.name: comment-intel
plugins.description: Rank a Facebook ad account's top-spending and positive-ROI posts, scrape every comment + reply (read-only), mirror photos/videos to your Cloudflare R2, and publish a searchable white-label gallery. Includes guided onboarding (Meta app, permissions, R2).
